title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates a panel with engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing how their teams are adopting AI coding tools at scale. They share workflow changes, productivity measurement approaches, and guidance for other engineering leaders making the transition.
